docFactsUsed: WebPageCommandManagerBase.cs:202-304,489-519 — permissionSummary.synchronize: READ + SYNCHRONIZE on the page AND all ancestor pages up the tree
changesSummary: Attempt 2 — targeted fix for GAP-003. Two changes to the permission sentence on line 158 of the Pages subsection: (1) Appended 'on the page and all its ancestor pages in the content tree' to accurately reflect the ancestor-chain permission requirement surfaced by code analysis (WebPageCommandManagerBase.cs). (2) Updated the page_link anchor from 'Permission requirements for page operations' to 'Page permissions for synchronizing pages' to match the new section heading added to the hub page in T-001. No other content changed.
